name: Gray Forrester
ticker: GRAY FORRESTER - PORTFOLIO OF IDEAS, PROJECTS & OTHER ODDS AND ENDS - EST. 2026

home.heroLede: Hi there, I'm Gray. This is a place for me to showcase what I've built at school, what I've built at work, what I've built in-between school and work, and what I've built with my new pal Claude. These days that means production agents in Langflow at ConvergeHEALTH by Deloitte by day, and Georgia Tech's M.S. in computer science (AI focus) by night — a product owner who crossed into engineering.

body: Currently, I’m a product owner and forward-deployed engineer at Deloitte's ConvergeHEALTH, the arm that ships software with a focus on HealthTech. There, I’m helping build an agentic platform: AI agents doing real work in a domain where stability is paramount. The job is half product owner, half solutioning.

school.lede: Learning the theory underpinning computer science and AI in general. This helps me understand what truly goes into effective agents: reward signals, control loops, state and search. Due to the nature of the OMSCS program and their honor-code, source code stays private — but I'm happy to walk through the design decisions live.

play.stripRight: LIVE AND BUILT WITH CLAUDE CODE
play.lede: After-hours SaaS apps, built end-to-end with Claude Code and live in production. Primarily built for fun and to understand the process of launching SaaS apps in 2026.

contact.heroLede: Drop me a line! Recruiters, collaborators, people with strong opinions about who the greatest songwriter of all time is - anyone!
